title: FinTech Analytics Dashboard — Dark Mode High-Density UI
description: Production-grade React + Tailwind prompt for generating a high-density financial analytics dashboard with complex data visualization, glassmorphism cards, and sophisticated state management requirements.

content.text: Build a React functional component for a high-density FinTech analytics dashboard using TailwindCSS. Architecture requirements: Strict dark mode (zinc-900 to zinc-950 background gradients), 1px zinc-800 borders on all glassmorphic data cards, Inter or Geist Sans typography system. Include a 3-column bento-style layout. Left column: Navigation sidebar with active state micro-interactions. Center column: Hero chart area with interactive tooltip zones, followed by a recent transactions data table featuring sticky headers and status pill badges. Right column: Real-time ticker cards with pulse animations for upward/downward price action. State management: Use a mock Zustand store structure. Use lucide-react for iconography. Implement subtle hover states (bg-zinc-800/50) and active ring focus utilities. Ensure responsive reflow to a single column below 1024px.

promptToCopy: Build a React functional component for a high-density FinTech analytics dashboard using TailwindCSS. Architecture requirements: Strict dark mode (zinc-900 to zinc-950 background gradients), 1px zinc-800 borders on all glassmorphic data cards, Inter or Geist Sans typography system. Include a 3-column bento-style layout. Left column: Navigation sidebar with active state micro-interactions. Center column: Hero chart area with interactive tooltip zones, followed by a recent transactions data table featuring sticky headers and status pill badges. Right column: Real-time ticker cards with pulse animations for upward/downward price action. State management: Use a mock Zustand store structure. Use lucide-react for iconography. Implement subtle hover states (bg-zinc-800/50) and active ring focus utilities. Ensure responsive reflow to a single column below 1024px.

_db.longDescription: Ideal for generating instant production-ready dashboards for SaaS platforms.

variables.name: primary_color
variables.description: Tailwind color scale for active states

_db.exampleOutput: A complete React component file with emerald-accented FinTech dashboard layout.

title: Neo-Brutalist E-commerce Interface — High-Contrast Grid
description: Architectural prompt for a brutalist web interface featuring sharp borders, high-contrast typography, and aggressive grid systems.

content.text: Design a Neo-Brutalist e-commerce product landing page in React. Styling rules: Absolute stark contrast using #000000 and #FFFFFF with one aggressive accent color ({{accent}}). Typography: Use a heavy display sans-serif (e.g., Space Grotesk or Monument Extended) pushed to maximum weight for headers. UI Elements: All buttons and cards must have thick 3px solid black borders, hard drop shadows (box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px #000000), and absolutely no border-radius (0px). Layout: Utilize a visible CSS grid architecture where border lines extend to the edges of the viewport. Interactive elements should invert colors on hover instantly (no transition duration). Include a marquee ticker tape component at the top, a massive hero product image on a pure white background, and an oversized 'ADD TO BAG' call to action.

promptToCopy: Design a Neo-Brutalist e-commerce product landing page in React. Styling rules: Absolute stark contrast using #000000 and #FFFFFF with one aggressive accent color ({{accent}}). Typography: Use a heavy display sans-serif (e.g., Space Grotesk or Monument Extended) pushed to maximum weight for headers. UI Elements: All buttons and cards must have thick 3px solid black borders, hard drop shadows (box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px #000000), and absolutely no border-radius (0px). Layout: Utilize a visible CSS grid architecture where border lines extend to the edges of the viewport. Interactive elements should invert colors on hover instantly (no transition duration). Include a marquee ticker tape component at the top, a massive hero product image on a pure white background, and an oversized 'ADD TO BAG' call to action.

_db.longDescription: Perfect for edgy fashion brands, independent design studios, and streetwear e-commerce sites.

variables.description: Hex code for the aggressive accent color

_db.exampleOutput: A React functional component implementing the stark neo-brutalist aesthetic with toxic green accents.

title: Optical Caustics Perfume Macro — Material Realism
description: High-fidelity FLUX prompt for commercial product photography focused on extreme optical refraction, liquid dynamics, and premium glass textures.

content.text: Macro commercial product photograph of a geometric crystal perfume bottle resting on a rippled mirror surface. Environmental lighting: A single intense collimated spotlight cuts through a dense atmospheric haze, striking the faceted glass to cast razor-sharp spectral dispersion caustics across the dark background. Material realism: The glass exhibits severe refractive index accuracy, thick base weighting, and subtle condensation micro-droplets. The liquid inside is a glowing golden amber hue with sub-surface scattering. Cinematic framing: The bottle occupies the lower right golden ratio intersection, allowing the optical light patterns to dominate the negative space. Shot on 100mm macro lens, f/8 for deep focal plane, ISO 100, photorealistic 8k render quality, highly tactile surface textures.
content.negativePrompt: CGI plastic look, soft focus, messy reflections, overlapping shadows, muddy colors, digital artifacts, floating objects

The liquid inside is a glowing golden amber hue with sub-surface scattering. Cinematic framing: The bottle occupies the lower right golden ratio intersection, allowing the optical light patterns to dominate the negative space. _db.exampleOutput: A stunning 16:9 macro shot of a crystal bottle with intricate rainbow light caustics on a dark background.

title: Neon-Noir Cinematic Portrait — Atmospheric Density
description: Midjourney v6 prompt engineered for maximum cinematic mood, utilizing advanced lens parameters, volumetric fog, and complex edge illumination.

content.text: Cinematic medium-close portrait of a rogue hacker in a rain-slicked Tokyo alleyway, neon-noir aesthetic. Lighting: Motivated edge illumination from a flickering magenta neon sign out-of-frame right, casting harsh specular highlights on a wet leather jacket collar, contrasted by cool cyan ambient street-light fill from the left. Atmosphere: Thick volumetric diffusion from steaming street vents, rendering the background a bokeh wash of anamorphic light streaks. Camera physics: Shot on anamorphic 50mm Panavision lens, T1.4, shallow depth of field perfectly isolating the subject's rain-streaked cybernetic optic implant. Texture: Procedural film grain, 35mm celluloid aesthetic, high micro-contrast on the skin pores and metal joints. Asymmetric composition, moody, hyper-realistic, dramatic temporal tension. --ar 21:9 --style raw --stylize 250 --v 6.0
content.negativePrompt: flat lighting, 3d render, cartoon, anime, bright daylight, clear sky, perfectly clean clothes, symmetrical framing

title: K8s CI/CD Pipeline Architect — Infrastructure as Code
description: Advanced coding prompt to generate a production-ready Kubernetes deployment pipeline with Terraform, GitHub Actions, and security guardrails.

content.text: Act as a Principal DevOps Engineer. Design and generate the complete code for a zero-downtime CI/CD pipeline deploying a containerized microservice to a highly-available AWS EKS cluster. Requirements: 1) A GitHub Actions workflow YAML that includes phases for linting, Trivy vulnerability scanning, Docker image building with multi-stage caching, and pushing to Amazon ECR. 2) A set of Terraform configuration files (main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf) to provision the ECR repository and IAM OIDC provider for passwordless GitHub authentication. 3) A Kubernetes Helm chart structure (Deployment, HPA, PodDisruptionBudget, and Service) utilizing RollingUpdate strategy, resource requests/limits, and liveness/readiness probes. Ensure all code follows security best practices (least privilege, immutable tags, no hardcoded secrets) and include a concise architecture markdown summary detailing the failover and rollback strategy.

promptToCopy: Act as a Principal DevOps Engineer. Design and generate the complete code for a zero-downtime CI/CD pipeline deploying a containerized microservice to a highly-available AWS EKS cluster. Requirements: 1) A GitHub Actions workflow YAML that includes phases for linting, Trivy vulnerability scanning, Docker image building with multi-stage caching, and pushing to Amazon ECR. 2) A set of Terraform configuration files (main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf) to provision the ECR repository and IAM OIDC provider for passwordless GitHub authentication. 3) A Kubernetes Helm chart structure (Deployment, HPA, PodDisruptionBudget, and Service) utilizing RollingUpdate strategy, resource requests/limits, and liveness/readiness probes. Ensure all code follows security best practices (least privilege, immutable tags, no hardcoded secrets) and include a concise architecture markdown summary detailing the failover and rollback strategy.

_db.longDescription: Saves hours of boilerplate coding by generating a secure, industry-standard deployment pipeline structure.
_db.exampleOutput: Multiple code blocks including main.tf, deployment.yaml, and deployment.yml (GitHub Actions).

title: Minimalist Luxury Monogram — Vector Branding
description: Generates ultra-premium luxury fashion monogram logos utilizing precise architectural geometry, negative space, and typographic elegance.

content.text: A hyper-minimalist luxury fashion monogram logo featuring the intersecting letters '{{initials}}'. The design utilizes severe architectural geometry, extreme contrast between thick and razor-thin strokes (Didone typographic influence), and masterful use of negative space to create a seamless optical illusion where the letters merge. Vector-style flat graphic, absolute pure black on a pristine white background. No gradients, no 3D effects, no shadows, no distracting ornaments. Clean, authoritative, timeless elegance, echoing heritage brands like Saint Laurent or Givenchy, but modernized. High-fidelity editorial quality, mathematically perfect proportions, striking visual balance. --v 6.0 --style raw

title: FPV Drone Volumetric Forest — Continuous Temporal Motion
description: High-velocity AI video prompt dictating precise camera banking, spatial continuity, and lighting shifts in a dense environmental setting.

content.text: First-person-view (FPV) cinematic drone video continuously flying through a dense, ancient redwood forest at high velocity. Camera dynamics: aggressive banking and rolling maneuvers to narrowly dodge massive moss-covered tree trunks, maintaining spatial continuity and relentless forward momentum without clipping objects. Lighting: The environment is shrouded in early morning mist, pierced by God-rays (volumetric light shafts) cascading through the canopy. As the drone passes through shadows into sudden bursts of golden hour sunlight, the camera auto-exposure dynamically adjusts, creating realistic lens flares. Environment: lush ferns, floating pollen particles caught in the downdraft, hyper-realistic bark textures. Smooth 60fps pacing, ultra-fluid 6-DOF movement, 4k resolution, cinematic color grading mimicking Arri Alexa sensor science.
content.negativePrompt: jitter, artifacting, morphing trees, camera clipping through objects, static camera, unnatural physics, flat lighting, muddy textures

As the drone passes through shadows into sudden bursts of golden hour sunlight, the camera auto-exposure dynamically adjusts, creating realistic lens flares. Smooth 60fps pacing, ultra-fluid 6-DOF movement, 4k resolution, cinematic color grading mimicking Arri Alexa sensor science.

_db.exampleOutput: A breathtaking high-speed flight through a foggy redwood forest dodging trees with perfect temporal consistency.

title: PostgreSQL Performance Optimization — GIN Indexing & CTEs
description: Expert-level coding prompt designed to analyze slow database queries and refactor them using advanced indexing and execution plan logic.

content.text: Act as a Senior Database Administrator. Analyze the following highly inefficient PostgreSQL query that searches through a massive JSONB column and performs multiple nested subqueries. Your task is to refactor this query for a high-concurrency production environment. Requirements: 1) Replace the nested subqueries with a clean, readable Common Table Expression (CTE) pipeline. 2) Provide the exact exact Data Definition Language (DDL) command to create a GIN index on the target JSONB fields to ensure index-only scans or bitmap heap scans. 3) Explain the query execution plan difference (EXPLAIN ANALYZE) between the old and new query, focusing on cost reduction and memory usage. 4) Ensure the refactored SQL avoids N+1 data fetch problems and utilizes lateral joins if necessary. Output the final optimized SQL script and the architectural explanation in well-structured markdown.

promptToCopy: Act as a Senior Database Administrator. Analyze the following highly inefficient PostgreSQL query that searches through a massive JSONB column and performs multiple nested subqueries. Your task is to refactor this query for a high-concurrency production environment. Requirements: 1) Replace the nested subqueries with a clean, readable Common Table Expression (CTE) pipeline. 2) Provide the exact exact Data Definition Language (DDL) command to create a GIN index on the target JSONB fields to ensure index-only scans or bitmap heap scans. 3) Explain the query execution plan difference (EXPLAIN ANALYZE) between the old and new query, focusing on cost reduction and memory usage. 4) Ensure the refactored SQL avoids N+1 data fetch problems and utilizes lateral joins if necessary. Output the final optimized SQL script and the architectural explanation in well-structured markdown.

_db.longDescription: An invaluable tool for backend engineers dealing with massive JSONB payload searches in PostgreSQL.
_db.exampleOutput: Markdown response with optimized CTE SQL, CREATE INDEX statements, and execution plan breakdown.

title: Experimental Swiss Typography — Editorial Grid Poster
description: Generates avant-garde typography posters inspired by the International Typographic Style, focusing on rigorous grids and striking letterform manipulation.

content.text: An avant-garde editorial poster design inspired by the Swiss Style (International Typographic Style). The composition is anchored by a rigorous asymmetrical multi-column mathematical grid. The primary visual element is a massive, distorted letter '{{letter}}' using Helvetica Neue, stretched and warped through an optical scanner feedback loop effect, creating beautiful horizontal typographic tearing and motion blur. A stark, disciplined color palette: pure Swiss red (#DA291C), black ink, and off-white paper texture. Tiny, meticulously aligned block paragraphs of technical placeholder text sit in the extreme corners, contrasting with the massive scale of the central letterform. Design aesthetics: maximalist tension, precise alignment, tactile print quality with visible offset lithography halftone dots and subtle ink bleed at the edges. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0

title: AI Agent Cognitive Interface — Transparent HUD
description: UI/UX prompt to generate a highly futuristic yet usable dashboard for a multi-modal AI agent working in real-time.

content.text: Design a high-fidelity UI mockup for a next-generation AI Agent operating system. The interface is a dark mode, full-viewport dashboard (bg-zinc-950). Center stage: A real-time 'cognitive graph' visualizing the AI's thought process through glowing neural nodes and connecting splines, rendered with WebGL-style glowing vectors in electric blue and hyper-violet. Left panel: A streaming command-line interface with monospace typography detailing sub-agent task execution and status codes. Right panel: A sleek glassmorphic context window with a severe blur backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl), showing multimodal inputs (a miniature video feed being analyzed, code snippets being compiled). The design uses a micro-grid system, razor-thin neon borders to delineate sections, and bespoke technical iconography. Absolute premium visual hierarchy, conveying immense computational power and sleek sophistication. Modern, tech-wear aesthetic.

title: Ultra Slow-Motion Liquid Crown — Viscosity Physics
description: Video prompt engineered for extreme frame-rate simulation, capturing the precise surface tension physics of liquid impact.

content.text: Ultra high-speed phantom camera video (10,000 fps playback) capturing the exact micro-second a single drop of thick, iridescent metallic liquid mercury impacts a perfectly still pool of the same substance. The impact generates a mathematically perfect symmetrical 'splash crown'—a coronet of liquid spikes, each topped with a spherical micro-droplet separating from the main body. The material displays high-viscosity surface tension, bending light with intense specular reflections. Lighting: A single overhead ring light creates a continuous circular highlight tracing the inner rim of the splash crown, contrasting against a pitch-black studio void. The camera is positioned at macro water-level, angled slightly upward. Zero temporal artifacting, absolute fluid dynamics fidelity, cinematic color depth, incredibly sharp focal plane on the leading edge of the crown. 4k resolution.

title: Enterprise Auth Flow — React Component Architecture
description: Code generation prompt for a complete, secure authentication UI pattern with complex state handling, validation, and flawless aesthetics.

content.text: Develop a production-ready Authentication Flow UI using Next.js, React Hook Form, Zod for validation, and TailwindCSS. The UI must include a centered, glassmorphic login card over a dark, animated mesh gradient background. Inside the card: 1) A clean, typography-led header. 2) Email/Password inputs with floating labels, custom focus rings (ring-2 ring-violet-500/50), and inline real-time error messages with smooth framer-motion slide-down animations. 3) A 'Magic Link' alternative login state. 4) An OAuth provider block (Google/GitHub) with custom SVG icons and hover lift effects. 5) An interactive submit button that transitions into a loading spinner state upon submission. Include the Zod schema definition for strict password constraints (uppercase, number, special char) and document the state machine transitioning between 'idle', 'submitting', and 'success'. Must be fully accessible (aria-labels, keyboard navigation).

promptToCopy: Develop a production-ready Authentication Flow UI using Next.js, React Hook Form, Zod for validation, and TailwindCSS. The UI must include a centered, glassmorphic login card over a dark, animated mesh gradient background. Inside the card: 1) A clean, typography-led header. 2) Email/Password inputs with floating labels, custom focus rings (ring-2 ring-violet-500/50), and inline real-time error messages with smooth framer-motion slide-down animations. 3) A 'Magic Link' alternative login state. 4) An OAuth provider block (Google/GitHub) with custom SVG icons and hover lift effects. 5) An interactive submit button that transitions into a loading spinner state upon submission. Include the Zod schema definition for strict password constraints (uppercase, number, special char) and document the state machine transitioning between 'idle', 'submitting', and 'success'. Must be fully accessible (aria-labels, keyboard navigation).

_db.longDescription: Save 4+ hours of boilerplate by generating a flawless, accessible, and secure authentication frontend.
_db.exampleOutput: A comprehensive Next.js file containing the auth component, Zod schemas, and animation variants.

title: Hypebeast Sneaker Product Photography — Floating Dynamics
description: Commercial photography prompt for streetwear e-commerce, focusing on dynamic suspension, material textures, and studio lighting.

content.text: High-end commercial product photography for a futuristic streetwear sneaker. The shoe is suspended in mid-air, angled dynamically to showcase both the lateral profile and the complex tread pattern on the sole. The background is an infinite, seamless studio cyclorama in a deep, moody charcoal grey. Lighting setup: A large overhead softbox provides a soft fill, while dual rim lights (one warm orange, one cool cyan) trace the aggressive, technical silhouette of the shoe, creating an energetic split-tone edge highlight. Material focus: Hyper-detailed rendering of the breathable knit mesh, matte rubber overlays, and glossy translucent air-cushioning units. UI elements like toggles and sliders have physical depth and cast soft realistic shadows onto the glass surface below them. Premium, immersive, volumetric design language.

_db.longDescription: The definitive prompt for brainstorming AR/VR application layouts with accurate depth and refraction aesthetics.
_db.exampleOutput: A stunning 16:9 concept of floating glass UI panels in a blurred modern living room.

title: Next.js SaaS Boilerplate — Stripe Integration Logic
description: Comprehensive coding architecture prompt to generate a secure, webhook-driven Stripe subscription system within a Next.js App Router environment.

content.text: Act as a Senior Fullstack Engineer. Write the complete, production-ready implementation for a Stripe Subscription billing system in a Next.js 14 App Router application. Requirements: 1) A clean UI component in React/Tailwind for a pricing table displaying 'Pro' and 'Enterprise' tiers. 2) The Server Action (app/actions/stripe.ts) to create a Stripe Checkout Session, passing the user ID in the metadata. 3) The crucial Webhook Route Handler (app/api/webhook/stripe/route.ts) that securely verifies the Stripe signature and processes the 'checkout.session.completed' and 'customer.subscription.updated' events. 4) The database update logic (using Prisma mock syntax) to activate or revoke user premium status. Ensure you handle raw body parsing correctly for the webhook signature verification and provide inline comments explaining the error-handling strategy.

promptToCopy: Act as a Senior Fullstack Engineer. Write the complete, production-ready implementation for a Stripe Subscription billing system in a Next.js 14 App Router application. Requirements: 1) A clean UI component in React/Tailwind for a pricing table displaying 'Pro' and 'Enterprise' tiers. 2) The Server Action (app/actions/stripe.ts) to create a Stripe Checkout Session, passing the user ID in the metadata. 3) The crucial Webhook Route Handler (app/api/webhook/stripe/route.ts) that securely verifies the Stripe signature and processes the 'checkout.session.completed' and 'customer.subscription.updated' events. 4) The database update logic (using Prisma mock syntax) to activate or revoke user premium status. Ensure you handle raw body parsing correctly for the webhook signature verification and provide inline comments explaining the error-handling strategy.

_db.longDescription: A critical time-saver for developers building SaaS products, generating secure payment webhook infrastructure.
_db.exampleOutput: Well-structured Next.js files covering UI, Server Actions, and a robust Stripe Webhook handler.

title: Generative Loader Animation — Continuous Morphing
description: Video prompt for motion design: creates infinitely morphing, highly satisfying geometric loaders for premium UI implementations.

content.text: Smooth, seamless motion graphics animation of a loading spinner. A clean, minimal white geometric shape (starting as a perfect circle) suspended in the center of a pitch-black background. Over 6 seconds, the shape undergoes complex fluid metamorphosis: the circle gracefully extrudes into a 3D mobius strip, twists, collapses into a sharp tetrahedron, and finally morphs smoothly back into the perfect circle. The motion is governed by buttery smooth easing curves (ease-in-out), creating a hypnotic, rhythmic pulse. Lighting is studio-like, rendering the object as frosted glass that glows softly from within. Perfect loop geometry, 60fps, absolutely no background distraction, ultra-high resolution. Minimalist tech-company aesthetic.
content.negativePrompt: jitter, artifacting, abrupt cuts, colors, messy background, low frame rate, complex busy geometry

The motion is governed by buttery smooth easing curves (ease-in-out), creating a hypnotic, rhythmic pulse. Lighting is studio-like, rendering the object as frosted glass that glows softly from within. Perfect loop geometry, 60fps, absolutely no background distraction, ultra-high resolution. title: Production RAG Backend — FastAPI & LangChain
description: Comprehensive coding prompt to generate a secure, high-performance Retrieval-Augmented Generation API pipeline.

content.text: Act as a Lead AI Engineer. Write the complete Python backend architecture using FastAPI, LangChain, and a vector database (e.g., Pinecone or Qdrant) for a production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system. Requirements: 1) A clean folder structure representation. 2) The main API router with an endpoint `/api/v1/query` that accepts a user prompt. 3) The core service logic that takes the query, embeds it using OpenAI's embedding model, performs a similarity search with a filter on metadata (e.g., tenant_id to ensure data separation), retrieves the top_k context chunks, and formats them into a robust system prompt. 4) A streaming response setup (using Server-Sent Events) returning the LLM generation chunk by chunk. Emphasize error handling for API limits and invalid inputs. Code must be fully typed and adhere to PEP-8.

promptToCopy: Act as a Lead AI Engineer. Write the complete Python backend architecture using FastAPI, LangChain, and a vector database (e.g., Pinecone or Qdrant) for a production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system. Requirements: 1) A clean folder structure representation. 2) The main API router with an endpoint `/api/v1/query` that accepts a user prompt. 3) The core service logic that takes the query, embeds it using OpenAI's embedding model, performs a similarity search with a filter on metadata (e.g., tenant_id to ensure data separation), retrieves the top_k context chunks, and formats them into a robust system prompt. 4) A streaming response setup (using Server-Sent Events) returning the LLM generation chunk by chunk. Emphasize error handling for API limits and invalid inputs. Code must be fully typed and adhere to PEP-8.

_db.longDescription: Accelerates AI application development by providing a secure, stream-ready backend framework.
_db.exampleOutput: Well-commented Python scripts demonstrating routing, embedding, retrieval, and SSE streaming.

title: High-Fashion Desert Editorial — Cinematic Framing
description: Premium prompt for generating Vogue-tier fashion photography, leveraging complex environmental scale, wardrobe physics, and dramatic lighting.

content.text: A breathtaking high-fashion editorial photograph set in the monumental rolling sand dunes of the Sahara at deep twilight. A striking avant-garde model stands atop a dune crest, wearing an impossibly voluminous, sculptural gown made of iridescent crimson silk. The wind catches the fabric, whipping it into a massive, frozen wave of red that dominates the upper right quadrant of the composition. Lighting: The sun has just dipped below the horizon, bathing the dunes in a cool, moody blue hour ambient light, while a powerful off-camera HMI strobe flashes from the left, illuminating the model and the dress with stark, dramatic intensity. The contrast between the electric crimson fabric and the cool blue twilight desert creates intense chromatic tension. Shot from a low angle on medium format film, 35mm lens, hyper-detailed texture on the sand ripples and silk folds. Vogue magazine cover aesthetic. --ar 3:4 --v 6.0
content.negativePrompt: casual clothing, bright sunny day, flat lighting, messy composition, blurry, uninspired pose, normal dress

The contrast between the electric crimson fabric and the cool blue twilight desert creates intense chromatic tension. title: SaaS Hero Section — High-Converting Copy & Layout
description: Generates an intricately detailed structure for a high-converting SaaS landing page hero section, merging copy, layout, and visual direction.

content.text: Design the ultimate hero section for a B2B AI copywriting SaaS landing page. Layout structure: Split 50/50. Left side content: A massive, bold headline (H1) that reads 'Write Copy That Converts, At The Speed Of Thought.' using Inter Tight, heavily weighted. Below, a descriptive subheadline in a muted zinc-400 color explaining the value proposition. A primary CTA button (solid vivid purple, rounded-full, with an animated arrow icon on hover) next to a secondary 'Book a Demo' ghost button. Below the buttons, a social proof micro-banner: small overlapping avatars and text 'Trusted by 10,000+ marketers'. Right side visual: A 3D isometric mockup of the app interface floating slightly, enveloped in a soft purple glowing aura. Background: Dark mode (zinc-950) with a very subtle, radial gradient mesh in deep violet behind the app mockup to draw the eye. Clean, enterprise-grade, high trust.

promptToCopy: Design the ultimate hero section for a B2B AI copywriting SaaS landing page. Layout structure: Split 50/50. Left side content: A massive, bold headline (H1) that reads 'Write Copy That Converts, At The Speed Of Thought.' using Inter Tight, heavily weighted. Below, a descriptive subheadline in a muted zinc-400 color explaining the value proposition. A primary CTA button (solid vivid purple, rounded-full, with an animated arrow icon on hover) next to a secondary 'Book a Demo' ghost button. Below the buttons, a social proof micro-banner: small overlapping avatars and text 'Trusted by 10,000+ marketers'. Right side visual: A 3D isometric mockup of the app interface floating slightly, enveloped in a soft purple glowing aura. Background: Dark mode (zinc-950) with a very subtle, radial gradient mesh in deep violet behind the app mockup to draw the eye. Clean, enterprise-grade, high trust.

_db.longDescription: The blueprint for building high-converting landing pages. Feed this into an LLM to generate React code, or Midjourney for a mockup.
_db.exampleOutput: A detailed layout structure and UI instruction set for a top-tier SaaS hero.

title: Retro-Futurist Synthesizer Interface — Tactile Hardware
description: Design prompt for creating hyper-realistic vintage/futuristic audio hardware interfaces with extreme tactile detail.

content.text: A hyper-realistic, macro close-up product shot of the interface panel of a fictional, retro-futuristic analog synthesizer. The panel is constructed from brushed aluminum and thick matte-black powder-coated steel. The interface is crowded with tactile components: heavy knurled aluminum rotary knobs, satisfying mechanical toggle switches, and glowing warm-amber segmented LED displays. Intricate, microscopic technical screen-printing labels every control in a clinical, thin Helvetica font. A tangle of brightly colored, braided patch cables (neon pink, cyan, yellow) plugs into brass audio jacks, casting sharp, distinct shadows across the metal plate. Lighting: Cinematic, moody studio lighting with a harsh rim light picking up the texture of the metal and the dust particles settling on the surface. Tactile, mechanical, audiophile aesthetic. 8k resolution, photorealism. --ar 16:9 --v 6.0
content.negativePrompt: flat 2d, vector illustration, modern touchscreen UI, clean sterile look, out of focus, poor anatomy of knobs

title: Punk Editorial Zine Layout — Chaotic Composition
description: Graphic design prompt for generating aggressive, chaotic print layouts inspired by DIY punk zines and modern brutalist typography.

content.text: A full-spread graphic design layout for an underground punk music zine. The composition is intentionally chaotic, brutalist, and anti-grid. Elements are layered destructively: torn halftone photographs of a live concert, scanned crumpled paper textures, and aggressive, oversized typography using a distressed sans-serif font spelling out 'NO FUTURE'. Text blocks are rotated at extreme angles, overlapping and obscuring parts of the imagery. The color palette is restricted to high-contrast black ink, raw newsprint off-white, and striking splashes of fluorescent safety yellow. Visible scanning artifacts, staple marks in the center fold, and xerox degradation effects throughout. Raw, visceral, high-energy print design aesthetic. --ar 3:2 --v 6.0
content.negativePrompt: clean layout, digital polish, corporate, boring, colorful, soft edges, modern UI, perfect alignment

title: Viral Kinetic Loop — Satisfying Physics Engine
description: Video prompt crafted specifically for TikTok/Reels to generate a mathematically perfect, highly satisfying looping 3D physics animation.

content.text: A perfectly seamless, infinitely looping 3D animation optimized for vertical social media. Subject: A heavy, polished chrome sphere rolling smoothly down a twisting, translucent pastel-pink glass track. As the sphere rolls, it triggers perfectly synchronized kinetic dominoes made of matte white ceramic, which fall in a satisfying wave pattern. The physics are completely dialed in: slow, deliberate, heavy gravity feeling. Lighting: Even, soft-box studio lighting, casting soft ambient occlusion shadows, highlighting the reflections in the chrome and the subsurface scattering in the glass. Pacing: The loop occurs exactly at the 8-second mark, where the ball drops through a portal and seamlessly emerges at the top of the track again. Absolutely no visible cuts, stuttering, or camera drift. ASMR visual aesthetic. 4K, 60fps, 9:16.
content.negativePrompt: visible cut, camera shake, jitter, messy background, low framerate, changing lighting, motion blur on loop point
